name: TMBThanachart Bank Public Company Limited
summary: TMB Bank Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides various commercial banking products and services to personal, small and medium sized enterprises, and corporate customers primarily in Thailand. It operates through Commercial Banking and Retail Banking segments. The company offers transactional, current accounts, savings, term deposits, multi-currency accounts, cash concentration and liquid accounts, and foreign currency deposits; supply chain solutions; personal and home loans, overdraft and construction loans, unsecured loans, letter of guarantee products, and working capital facilities; advisory services; loans for purchasing operating premises; and credit cards. It also provides mutual funds products; personal accident, life and health, motor, property, and travel insurance products; wealth banking products; mobile and Internet banking services; trade products and risk management by capital market products; payment, cash collection, and liquidity management services; custodian, fund supervisory, registrar and paying agent, fund accounting, and other agency services; debt capital market, loan arrangement and syndication, debt instrument, and merger and acquisition services, as well as property fund services for public offering; and digital banking, and bancassurance and business protection products. The company was founded in 1957 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
